title: BEM-866 analyze Claude report
objective:
Run script:
"""
report = Path('governance/reports/bem865_claude_write_selftest.md')
mailbox = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md')
report_text = report.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if report.exists() else ''
mailbox_text = mailbox.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if mailbox.exists() else ''
low = report_text.lower()
mail_lines = [line.strip() for line in mailbox_text.splitlines()]
mail_ok = 'Status: CLAUDE_WRITE_OK' in mail_lines
if mail_ok:
    status = 'MAILBOX_WRITE_CONFIRMED'
elif not report.exists():
    status = 'CLAUDE_REPORT_MISSING'
elif 'error' in low or 'failed' in low or 'failure' in low:
    status = 'CLAUDE_REPORT_ERROR'
elif 'claude_write_ok' in low:
    status = 'REPORT_HAS_TOKEN_MAILBOX_MISSING'
elif 'bem865_claude_write_selftest_response' in low or 'from_claude' in low:
    status = 'REPORT_MENTIONS_MAILBOX_NO_WRITE'
else:
    status = 'REPORT_EXISTS_NO_MAILBOX_WRITE'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_CLAUDE_REPORT_ANALYSIS_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 Claude report analysis\nStatus: ' + status + '\nReport exists: ' + str(report.exists()) + '\nMailbox OK: ' + str(mail_ok) + '\n\nReport prefix:\n' + report_text[:4000] + '\n\nMailbox prefix:\n' + mailbox_text[:1000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('Claude report analysis: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
